title: Liquid Stress
description: A solo productivity desktop app released on Steam with customizable timers, persistent task tracking, analytics, and hand-animated Blender assets.

title: Cosmic Portfolio
description: A full-stack interactive portfolio where projects appear as navigable stars in a Three.js galaxy with shaders, post-processing, and a secure admin panel.

title: SEC Financial Fund Scraper
description: A headless Playwright automation tool that crawls 77,000+ adviserinfo.sec.gov pages with retry logic, backoff handling, and resume-safe CSV deduplication.
